channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Oil slick, life rafts, dozens of bodies: What Sri Lankan navy found after US sank Iranian warship
item.description: Sri Lanka said its navy rescued 32 survivors after a U.S. torpedo sank Iranian warship IRIS Dena with 180 aboard. Crews recover 87 bodies from the wre...

item.title: Leavitt says ground troops in Iran not currently being considered, doesn't rule it out
item.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt won't rule out sending ground troops to Iran as part of Operation Epic Fury but says they are "not part o...

item.title: Trump teases kingmaker endorsement in Texas ‘soon’ to force other candidate out of runoff
item.description: Sen. John Cornyn, R-Texas, and Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton are headed for a bloody runoff, but President Donald Trump wants to end things quickl...

item.title: This Is Our Shocked Face: Mil Spouse Whining That Epic Fury Is a Distraction Is Far-Left Activist
Trump: Texas Senate Endorsement Near; Other Should Go
item.description: President Donald Trump said on Wednesday he’ll soon choose whether to endorse Sen. John Cornyn, R-Texas, or Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton — who ar...

item.title: DOJ Still Reviewing Epstein Files for Potential Release
item.description: The Justice Department is reviewing tens of thousands of documents connected to the Jeffrey Epstein case before posting them, according to a report by...

item.title: Number of Iranian ballistic missiles fired plunges since start of Operation Epic Fury
item.description: Chairman of the Joint Chiefs Gen. Dan Caine said Iranian missile and drone launches have sharply declined since Operation Epic Fury began.

item.title: Postal Service Turns to Advisers Over Financial Strain
item.description: The U.S. Postal Service has hired restructuring advisers as the agency warns it could run out of money within about a year if financial pressures are ...

item.title: WH Press Sec. Leavitt Rips 'Intellectually Dishonest' Media, Explains Epic Fury's Real Origin and Goals
House Republican faces ethics investigation over affair allegations
item.description: The House ethics committee opened an investigation into Texas Rep. Tony Gonzales over allegations of an affair with a female staffer on Wednesday.

item.title: Behold: The Media Distemper on Full Display in the Push to Undermine the Iran Strikes
Burchett: Voters Should Keep Us Honest to Ensure Iran Isn't a Forever War
item.description: Rep. Tim Burchett, R-Tenn., warned Tuesday that U.S. military action in Iran could slide into "another forever war," urging "MAGA voters" to stay "con...

item.title: Hitting Narco-Terrorists Where It Hurts: US, Ecuador Conduct Joint Military Operations in South America
FAA Closures Spur Briefing on Texas Drone Incidents
item.description: U.S. officials were set to give key senators a classified briefing on Wednesday after two incidents in Texas involving government drones that prompted...

item.title: America Tops World Oil & Gas Production Under New Agenda
